_doc: North-star wiring spec for QIG kernel-training VERDICT/DoD runs. The Run Manifest gate (scripts/run_manifest.py) diffs a run's actual wiring against this. A component listed REQUIRED_WIRED must have register status 'wired' AND on_acceptance_path=true, or the verdict launch BLOCKS unless explicitly waived on the record. Ordinary training iterations (--tier training) skip the gate — ceremony-free. Directive: matrix 3272a6b3.
_versioned: seed 2026-07-21 (CCAa). Rows are added/promoted as the Wiring Register lands and components get wired.

required_wired.why: north star = geo-Qwen (geometry-native) as the conversational teacher, not plain Qwen; verdict runs must declare it wired or waive
PI-mandated 7-HF-repo live stream, NOT the local curriculum cache; must be the data source on a verdict run
sleep/dream/mushroom/Φ-guard must be live so a collapsing newborn is corrected, not left dead
the live pillars (P1 fluctuations / P2 bulk / P3 identity) must actually check + correct per step
the verdict must be reported UNDER-POWERED (winner=None) if no arm clears the floor

should_wire_flagged.why: class-weighted, wrong-answer-decaying recall (real QIGRAM/QIGRAMv2) is the north-star memory; today only a single-point slerp cap runs under the name
geometry-native teacher; needs the EXP-A043 vocab-currency bridge (Qwen-vocab -> coordizer-vocab) exercised as the boundary

min_package_versions._note: installed on the acceptance venv must be >= these (latest-published). A stale pin is a launch blocker (Use-our-packages rule). Filled from the coordizer/pins audit.

must_not_be_live_on_path.pattern: retired kappa*=64.21 / KAPPA_STAR / TACKING_ATTRACTOR as a live compute constant
cosine/dot/Euclidean on Δ⁶³ basin objects wearing a QFI/Fisher-Rao/distance label

instrument_pins._doc: Named + versioned telemetry instruments pinned into every run manifest (PI ruling 2026-07-21): a metric that silently changes shape between runs is a drifting instrument. run_manifest.py records this block so each run declares which metric definitions produced its numbers.

relevance_metric.name: response_stimulus_relevance
relevance_metric.stimulus_basis: coordizer per-position Δ⁶³ (pcoords), NOT the mean-of-logprobs (v1, centroid-collapse bug)

version_history.1.0: mean-of-logprobs vs kernel Δ63 (centroid-collapse bug: newborn>ontopic)
